handlers.name: DisallowInvisibleHandler

fields.description: Tile flags - bit 3 (mask 0x8) indicates player has direct LOS to tile
Entity visibility state - value 2 indicates invisible/hidden

handlers.return_behavior: Returns 1 (allow targeting) if target visible, 0 (disallow) if invisible

handlers.name: HideByConditionHandler
handlers.purpose: Conditionally hides skill icons based on tactical condition evaluation

fields.description: Condition to evaluate for hiding decision

handlers.return_behavior: Returns INVERSE of condition result (XOR 1) - skill hidden when condition is FALSE

handlers.name: IsHiddenCondition
handlers.purpose: Tactical condition checking if actor is hidden from opposing side
handlers.return_behavior: For player-controlled actors: checks IsHiddenToAI. For AI actors: checks IsHiddenToPlayer

fields.description: Discovery flags - one bit per faction indicating if entity has been spotted
Hidden indicator icon shown when actor is hidden from player
Flag indicating actor is currently visible to player
Cached AI visibility state: 0=Unknown, 1=Visible to AI, 2=Hidden from AI
Revealed flag - when true, bypasses concealment penalties, always visible in vision range
VisionDirty flag - triggers visibility recalculation when set

key_methods.name: SetVisibility
key_methods.description: Sets visibility state, fires OnVisibleToPlayer/OnHiddenToPlayer events

key_methods.name: IsHiddenToAI
key_methods.description: Checks if hidden from all AI factions using LOS from each AI actor

key_methods.name: IsHiddenToPlayerAtTile
key_methods.description: Checks visibility from player/ally factions considering fog-of-war

key_methods.name: OnVisibleToPlayer
key_methods.description: Handler when becoming visible - removes icon, updates animation speed

key_methods.name: OnHiddenToPlayer
key_methods.description: Handler when becoming hidden - adds icon, pauses animations

key_methods.name: ResetVisibilityToAI
key_methods.description: Resets cached AI visibility state to unknown

fields.description: Entity flags - bit 11 indicates always visible

functions.name: Actor_HasLineOfSightTo
functions.description: Core visibility calculation between two actors
functions.algorithm: EffectiveVision = Vision - max(0, (Concealment - Detection) + CoverBonus + ElevationBonus). Returns true if Distance <= EffectiveVision AND unobstructed LOS exists

functions.name: LineOfSight_HasLineOfSight
functions.description: Low-level tile raycasting for LOS obstruction check
functions.notes: Checks bit 11 at tile+0x1c for LOS blocking. Max 1000 iterations safety limit.

fog_of_war.description: Boolean at Map+0x38 controls fog-of-war enabled state
fog_of_war.behavior: When enabled, visibility is recalculated for all player faction actors. Tiles outside vision range appear fogged.

tactical_manager_events.description: Fired when any actor becomes visible to player faction
Fired when any actor becomes hidden from player faction
Fired when entity is first discovered by a faction

key_discoveries.details: AI visibility state is cached at actor+0x1a4 to avoid expensive LOS recalculation every frame. States: 0=Unknown (recalc needed), 1=Visible, 2=Hidden. ResetVisibilityToAI clears cache.
Actor+0x1ac 'Revealed' flag completely bypasses concealment/cover penalties. When true, only vision range matters for detection.
Entity uses 0x50 bitmask for discovery flags, Actor adds 0x138 for per-faction tracking. Player (1) and Ally (2) factions are always discovered together (bits set as pair).
ChangePropertyHandler checks PropertyType values 0 (Vision) and 0x14 (SightRangeMult) to set VisionDirty flag at 0x1ad, triggering map visibility recalculation.
EffectiveVisionRange = BaseVision - max(0, (TargetConcealment - ObserverDetection) + TileElevationBonus + CoverBonus). Target visible if Distance <= EffectiveVisionRange.
Bit 11 of EntityProperties+0xec flags entity as always visible regardless of LOS/range calculations.
Visibility checks branch based on controller: Player-controlled actors check IsHiddenToAI, AI actors check IsHiddenToPlayer. System iterates through opposing faction actor lists for LOS checks.
When actor becomes hidden from player, a world-space icon is spawned at actor position (stored at 0xe8). Removed when actor becomes visible again.
